_meta.description: Schema v2 — designed from analysis of 200 MultiHopRAG test queries and 173 unique evidence articles. 84% of queries reference specific publications, 54% reference 2+ publications, 23% reference specific dates.
_meta.design_rationale: No catch-all edges (ASSOCIATED_WITH/HAS_RELATIONSHIP are banned). Every edge must carry specific semantic meaning. Publication node is first-class because 84% of queries name a source.

nodes.label: Person
nodes.description: Named individuals only. Athletes (Travis Kelce, Lionel Messi, Tyreek Hill, Scott McTominay), executives (Sam Bankman-Fried, Sam Altman, Tim Sweeney, Sundar Pichai), politicians, journalists, actors. Must be a proper noun referring to a specific human.

nodes.label: Organization
nodes.description: Companies, sports teams, agencies, non-profits. Examples: FTX, Alameda Research, OpenAI, Google, Apple, Epic Games, Kansas City Chiefs, Manchester United, Paradigm, Jane Street, NCAA.

nodes.label: Publication
nodes.description: News outlets and media sources that publish articles. This is CRITICAL — extract this for every article. Examples: TechCrunch, The Verge, Fortune, Sporting News, The Independent, The Age, Polygon, CNBC, The Guardian, CBSSports.com, Engadget, TalkSport, BBC News, FOX News, The Sydney Morning Herald, Music Business Worldwide, Essentially Sports, The Roar, Yardbarker, The New York Times, Sportskeeda.

nodes.label: Product
nodes.description: Tangible goods, hardware, software products. Examples: ChatGPT, GPT-4, Pixel 8, iPhone, Gemini, FTT token.

nodes.label: CreativeWork
nodes.description: Movies, TV shows, albums, video games, books, songs. Examples: Fortnite, Diablo 4, Spider-Man 2, The Crown, Pulse.

nodes.label: Location
nodes.description: Physical places: countries, cities, venues, stadiums. Examples: Arrowhead Stadium, Silicon Valley, Manhattan Federal Court, Old Trafford, BMO Field.

nodes.label: Event
nodes.description: Named occurrences with specific context: trials, matches, tournaments, conferences, elections. Examples: SBF Trial, Epic v. Google Trial, 2023 Winter Meetings, Week 14, OpenAI DevDay, Champions League 2023.

nodes.label: LegalCharge
nodes.description: Specific criminal or civil charges. Examples: wire fraud, conspiracy, money laundering, antitrust violation.

nodes.label: Award
nodes.description: Honors and recognitions. Examples: Time Person of the Year, Rookie of the Year, NBA MVP.

edges.label: REPORTED_BY
edges.description: Connects ANY entity to the Publication that wrote about it. This is the MOST IMPORTANT edge. If a chunk mentions which publication wrote the article, create this edge. Example: (SBF Trial) -[REPORTED_BY]-> (TechCrunch). (Taylor Swift) -[REPORTED_BY]-> (The Independent). Use liberally.

edges.label: CEO_OF
edges.description: Person is/was CEO of Organization. (Sam Bankman-Fried) -[CEO_OF]-> (FTX). (Caroline Ellison) -[CEO_OF]-> (Alameda Research). (Sam Altman) -[CEO_OF]-> (OpenAI).

edges.label: WORKS_FOR
edges.description: Person employed by or plays for Organization (non-CEO roles). (Travis Kelce) -[WORKS_FOR]-> (Kansas City Chiefs). (Prabhakar Raghavan) -[WORKS_FOR]-> (Google).

edges.label: FOUNDED
edges.description: Person or Organization created/established another entity. (Sam Bankman-Fried) -[FOUNDED]-> (FTX). (Sam Bankman-Fried) -[FOUNDED]-> (Alameda Research).

edges.label: INVESTED_IN
edges.description: Financial investment. (Paradigm) -[INVESTED_IN]-> (FTX). DO NOT confuse with ownership.

edges.label: SUED
edges.description: One entity filed legal action against another. (Epic Games) -[SUED]-> (Google). (Helena World Chronicle) -[SUED]-> (Google).

edges.label: CHARGED_WITH
edges.description: Person facing criminal/civil charges. (Sam Bankman-Fried) -[CHARGED_WITH]-> (Wire Fraud).

edges.label: TESTIFIED_IN
edges.description: Person gave testimony in a legal Event. (Caroline Ellison) -[TESTIFIED_IN]-> (SBF Trial). (Prabhakar Raghavan) -[TESTIFIED_IN]-> (Google Antitrust Case).

edges.label: ROMANTIC_LINK
edges.description: Confirmed or rumored romantic relationship between two Persons. (Taylor Swift) -[ROMANTIC_LINK]-> (Travis Kelce). (Sam Bankman-Fried) -[ROMANTIC_LINK]-> (Caroline Ellison).

edges.label: ATTENDED
edges.description: Person was physically present at Location or Event. (Taylor Swift) -[ATTENDED]-> (Arrowhead Stadium).

edges.label: LOCATED_IN
edges.description: Entity is geographically situated in a Location. (Arrowhead Stadium) -[LOCATED_IN]-> (Kansas City). (FTX) -[LOCATED_IN]-> (Bahamas).

edges.label: COMPETED_IN
edges.description: Team or Person participated in a match/tournament Event. (Kansas City Chiefs) -[COMPETED_IN]-> (Chiefs vs Bears). (Michigan) -[COMPETED_IN]-> (The Game 2023).

edges.label: SCORED_IN
edges.description: Person scored points/goals in an Event. (Scott McTominay) -[SCORED_IN]-> (Man United vs Chelsea).

edges.label: PRODUCED
edges.description: Organization or Person created a Product or CreativeWork. (OpenAI) -[PRODUCED]-> (ChatGPT). (Epic Games) -[PRODUCED]-> (Fortnite).

edges.label: RECEIVED
edges.description: Person or work received an Award. (Taylor Swift) -[RECEIVED]-> (Time Person of the Year).

edges.label: COMPETES_WITH
edges.description: Direct business competition. (Epic Games Store) -[COMPETES_WITH]-> (Google Play Store). (Google Gemini) -[COMPETES_WITH]-> (ChatGPT).

edges.label: REGULATES
edges.description: Regulatory relationship. (GDPR) -[REGULATES]-> (Meta). Used for laws, acts, regulatory bodies.
